posts.author: michelle_flores (Michelle Flores)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I like to use the Info Boxes as a resource location for project assets. However, there’s no visual indication Info Boxes are available so they get overlooked. It would be cool if you could add a counter in Info Box tab, similar to the comment counter.
